highlights.title: MaterialX: Displacement & Shadows
highlights.description: MaterialX materials now support vertex displacement (procedural and texture-based), realtime shadows, displacement animation, and alpha mode detection — all built into Needle Engine 5.

highlights.title: FastHDR Environment Lighting
highlights.description: Coming to Needle Engine: environment lighting that loads 10x faster, uses 95% less VRAM, and needs zero CPU processing. Works on every device — even budget phones.

highlights.title: iOS WebXR with Needle
highlights.description: Full WebXR AR on iPhone and iPad — no app install needed. Powered by ARKit via App Clips, launched instantly from any link or QR code.
